items.title: Soham murderer Ian Huntley dies after prison attack
items.snippet: Huntley, who murdered two schoolgirls in 2002, had his life support switched off on Friday, the BBC understands.

items.title: Armed robots take to the battlefield in Ukraine war
items.snippet: Ukraine has embarked on a programme to deploy armed robots on the battlefield against Russian forces.

items.snippet: The Department of Justice said the released files had been "incorrectly coded as duplicative" and inadvertently not published.

items.snippet: The women have been interviewed under suspicion of aiding and abetting rape and human trafficking, the Met Police says.

items.title: Deadly storms and tornadoes strike US state of Michigan
items.snippet: A series of tornadoes tore through several cities, uprooting trees and destroying homes.

items.title: Russell takes Melbourne pole after Verstappen crash
items.snippet: George Russell takes pole position as Mercedes dominate a qualifying session for the Australian Grand Prix in which Max Verstappen crashed.
